summary: 9/10/2025 Added several additions to the “How to get without paying” section.
content:
9/10/2025 Added several additions to the “How to get without paying” section.

This is a summary of the main methods and events, etc to obtain the golden [historic generals](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/what-is-historic-general-en/ "What is Historic General (with list of generals)") (i.e., epic historic generals).

Note that almost all generals other than gold (white, green, blue, purple) can be obtained at the tavern.

*   [Basics 1: Tavern, Relic, General Chest](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/how-to-get-generals-en/#Basics_1_Tavern_Relic_General_Chest)
    *   [Tavern](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/how-to-get-generals-en/#Tavern)
    *   [Relic Chamber](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/how-to-get-generals-en/#Relic_Chamber)
    *   [Great General Chest](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/how-to-get-generals-en/#Great_General_Chest)

*   [Basic 2: Types of Generals Vouchers](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/how-to-get-generals-en/#Basic_2_Types_of_Generals_Vouchers)

title: Maximum March Size (by keep level) | Evony: The King's Return GUIDE WIKI
content:
1/28/2024 – Updated K37, K38, K39, K40.

Here is a reference value of the maximum number of troops per march (march size) for each keep level. (Keep levels 26 to 40).

Note – **This is NOT A PERFECTLY ACCURATE maximum value**.

The reason for this is that there are factors (below) that can increase your march size regardless of your keep level.

*   Monarch Gear
*   VIP
*   Rank
*   etc.

Stating the maximum values for these will not be practical for many people, as they are quite rare cases.

Therefore, these are listed based on my personal assumption that this is how many people are likely to be at this keep level.

**Note that there is room to raise the number of march sizes in this article further.**

title: Pasture | Evony: The King's Return GUIDE WIKI
summary: 8/11/2023 – Added note regarding association with Council of State. Updated upgrade requirements table.
content:
8/11/2023 – Added note regarding association with Council of State. Updated upgrade requirements table.

In Pasture, you can level up your [Spiritual Beasts](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/spiritual-beast-en/ "Spiritual Beast – Type, Buff, Enhance"), [Dragons](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/dragon-guide-en/ "Dragon Complete Guide – Type, Buff, Enhance") and [Seals](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/seal-en/ "Seal (Spiritual Beast)").

As the level of Pasture is raised, various Spiritual Beasts and Dragons become available.

Construction becomes possible at [Keep](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/upgrade-requirements-keep-en/ "Keep Upgrade Requirements & Unlocks  (~Lv40)") level 21.

To raise the level of Pasture, the level of the [Warehouse](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/warehouse-en/ "Warehouse") must be raised first.

In order to raise the level of [Council of State](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/council-of-state-en/ "Council of State"), it is necessary to raise the level of Pasture and[Victory Column](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/victory-column-en/)first.

title: Art Hall | Evony: The King's Return GUIDE WIKI
summary: If you collect a lot of art and generals, you will receive rewards and various buffs at the Art Hall.
content:
If you collect a lot of art and generals, you will receive rewards and various buffs at the Art Hall.

To receive rewards, the level of the Art Hall must be raised.

Construction becomes possible at [Keep](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/upgrade-requirements-keep-en/ "Keep Upgrade Requirements & Unlocks  (~Lv40)") level 11.

To raise the level of the [Keep](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/upgrade-requirements-keep-en/ "Keep Upgrade Requirements & Unlocks  (~Lv40)") to 28 or 33, or to raise the level of the [Triumphal Arch](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/triumphal-arch-en/ "Triumphal Arch"), the level of the Art Hall must be raised first.

title: Embassy | Evony: The King's Return GUIDE WIKI
summary: At the embassy, you can check the contents of reinforcements to you/your allies and send back or recall reinforcements.
content:
At the embassy, you can check the contents of reinforcements to you/your allies and send back or recall reinforcements.

Raising the embassy level has the following advantages

*   **Reinforcement**: Increased capacity to receive
*   **Construction**: Number of help received, shortening time increased
*   **Transporting resources**: Amount of resources that can be transported, Number of times, Amount of resources that can be received increase, and the Rate of transport fees decreases.

Construction becomes possible at [Keep](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/upgrade-requirements-keep-en/ "Keep Upgrade Requirements & Unlocks  (~Lv40)") level 9.

To raise the level of the [War Hall](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/war-hall-en/ "War Hall"), it is necessary to raise the level of the Embassy first.

To raise the level of the Embassy, the [Market](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/market-en/ "Market") must be raised first.

title: Forge | Evony: The King's Return GUIDE WIKI
summary: 7/27/2023 – Added Imperial equipment, Parthian equipment, & Forge Master Certificate.
content:
7/27/2023 – Added Imperial equipment, Parthian equipment, & Forge Master Certificate.

In the forge, the general’s equipment can be crafted. In order to craft strong equipment, it is necessary to raise the level of the forge.

Note that the crafting of [Civilization Equipment](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/civilization-equipment-en/ "Civilization Equipment – Recommended Combinations") is done at [Wonder](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/wonder-en/ "Wonder"), not at the forge. There is no need to raise the level of the forge. There is also no need to unlock Wonder. However, keep level 33 is required.

Materials and [Scrolls](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/how-to-get-scroll-en/ "How to get Scroll") are needed to craft the equipment.

It can be built at [keep](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/upgrade-requirements-keep-en/ "Keep Upgrade Requirements & Unlocks  (~Lv40)") level 7.

Note that the level of the [watchtower](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/watch-tower-en/ "Watchtower") must also be raised in order for the forge to be at level 26 or higher.

title: Hospital | Evony: The King's Return GUIDE WIKI
summary: (Note – The following cannot be healed or revived at the hospital. Siege machines (repaired at the [Trap Factory](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/trap-factory-en/ "Trap Factory")) / Souls of soldiers (revived at the Holy Palace) / Deserters (recalled at the Holy Palace) / Dead Generals (revived at the [Shrine](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/shrine-en/ "Shrine"))).
content:
![Image 1: Hospital](https://evonyguidewiki.com/wp-panda/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/IMG_6376-700x466.jpeg)

At the hospital, you can

*   Heal wounded soldiers
*   Revive soldiers who died during SvS

(Note – The following cannot be healed or revived at the hospital. Siege machines (repaired at the [Trap Factory](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/trap-factory-en/ "Trap Factory")) / Souls of soldiers (revived at the Holy Palace) / Deserters (recalled at the Holy Palace) / Dead Generals (revived at the [Shrine](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/shrine-en/ "Shrine"))).

Raising the level of the hospital increases the number of wounded soldiers that can be accommodated.

Construction becomes possible at [Keep](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/upgrade-requirements-keep-en/ "Keep Upgrade Requirements & Unlocks  (~Lv40)") level 6.

To raise the level of the [Research Factory](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/research-factory-en/ "Research Factory"), the Hospital must be raised first.

title: Market | Evony: The King's Return GUIDE WIKI
summary: The market provides a black market, auctions, and the tax collection of resources.
content:
The market provides a black market, auctions, and the tax collection of resources.

As the market level is raised, the products that appear on the black market become more luxurious, and the number of free tax collections and the amount of tax collections increase.

Construction becomes possible at [Keep](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/upgrade-requirements-keep-en/ "Keep Upgrade Requirements & Unlocks  (~Lv40)") level 6.

To raise the level of the [Embassy](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/embassy-en/ "Embassy"), the Market must be raised first.

title: Military Academy | Evony: The King's Return GUIDE WIKI
summary: The Military Academy allows for research that is not available at the [Academy](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/academy-en/ "Academy"), mainly to increase battle-oriented buffs and debuffs.
content:
![Image 1: Military Academy](https://evonyguidewiki.com/wp-panda/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/IMG_4781-700x467.jpeg)

The Military Academy allows for research that is not available at the [Academy](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/academy-en/ "Academy"), mainly to increase battle-oriented buffs and debuffs.

The higher the level of the Military Academy, the more research can be done.

Unlike research at the Academy, research at the Military Academy requires [Tactic Scroll](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/how-to-get-tactic-scroll-en/ "How to Get Tactic Scroll") and [Gold](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/how-to-get-gold-efficiently-en/ "How to get Gold efficiently"). Research Stone is not needed for now.

Construction becomes possible at [Keep](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/upgrade-requirements-keep-en/ "Keep Upgrade Requirements & Unlocks  (~Lv40)") level 36.

To raise the level of the [Keep](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/upgrade-requirements-keep-en/ "Keep Upgrade Requirements & Unlocks  (~Lv40)") to 37, the Military Academy must be built (level 1) first.

title: Prison | Evony: The King's Return GUIDE WIKI
summary: In the Prison, various actions can be performed on captives (soldiers and generals) captured in PvP.
content:
![Image 1: Prison](https://evonyguidewiki.com/wp-panda/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/IMG_6379-2-700x467.jpeg)

In the Prison, various actions can be performed on captives (soldiers and generals) captured in PvP.

*   Captive (soldier): Labor (to gain resources), Release (to gain prestige)
*   Captive (general): Release, Execute

As the level of the Prison is increased, the following increases

*   Prison Capacity
*   Captive Rate

Construction becomes possible at [Keep](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/upgrade-requirements-keep-en/ "Keep Upgrade Requirements & Unlocks  (~Lv40)") level 11.

To raise the level of the Prison, the level of the [Quarry](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/quarry-en/ "Quarry") must be raised first.

## “King’s Protection” Buff

Once your Shrine Level reaches a certain threshold, you can use a temporary buff (valid for 24 hours).

It activates after offering a certain number of times.

| Shrine Lv | Buff |  | Offer Count Required for Activation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 27 | Ranged Attack | +10% | 14 |
| 30 | Ranged Attack Mounted Defense | +10% | 14 |
| 33 | Ranged Attack Mounted & Ground Defense | +15% | 14 |
| 35 | Ranged & Siege Attack Mounted & Ground Defense | +20% | 14 |
| 36 | Ranged & Siege Attack Mounted & Ground Defense | +25% | 19 |
| 39 | Ranged & Siege Attack Mounted & Ground Defense | +30% | 24 |

summary: Raising the War Hall level will increase the rally capacity. (When you start your own rally, the maximum number of participants you can accept will increase.)
content:
![Image 1: War Hall](https://evonyguidewiki.com/wp-panda/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/IMG_6373-700x466.jpeg)

Raising the War Hall level will increase the rally capacity. (When you start your own rally, the maximum number of participants you can accept will increase.)

Construction becomes possible at [Keep](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/upgrade-requirements-keep-en/ "Keep Upgrade Requirements & Unlocks  (~Lv40)") level 9.

To raise the level of the War Hall, it is necessary to raise the level of the [Embassy](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/embassy-en/ "Embassy") first.

title: Warehouse | Evony: The King's Return GUIDE WIKI
summary: Raising the level of the storage facility will provide more protection for more in-city resources.
content:
![Image 1: Warehouse](https://evonyguidewiki.com/wp-panda/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/IMG_6374-700x467.jpeg)

Raising the level of the storage facility will provide more protection for more in-city resources.

*   Increased protection from enemy looting. (If your city is attacked by the enemy and you lose, the amount of resources protected from looting is increased.)
*   Increased protection from soldier upkeep. (The amount of food that can be kept without being automatically consumed is increased.)
*   Increased storage limit for resources gathered from resource tiles and relics.

To raise the level of [Pasture](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/pasture-en/ "Pasture"), the level of the Warehouse must be raised first.

title: Watchtower | Evony: The King's Return GUIDE WIKI
summary: Watchtower provides detailed scouting report and warns you when there are incoming troops marching towards your City. All features are unlocked at watchtower level 41.
content:
Watchtower provides detailed scouting report and warns you when there are incoming troops marching towards your City. All features are unlocked at watchtower level 41.

In addition, to get the [forge](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/forge-en/ "Forge") to level 26 or higher, the level of the watchtower must also be increased.

*   [Milestones](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/watch-tower-en/#Milestones)
*   [Upgrade requirements (resources, etc.)](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/watch-tower-en/#Upgrade_requirements_resources_etc)
*   [Other Building Guides](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/watch-tower-en/#Other_Building_Guides)

## Milestones

Below are the main milestones.

##### Forge-related

*   Lv27: Dragon equipment production in the forge 27
*   Lv30: Ares equipment production in the forge 30
*   Lv33: Achaemenidae equipment production in the forge 33

##### Scout-related

*   Lv4: Information on the amount of the City’s Food, Lumber, Stone, Ore
*   Lv8: Information on the number of incoming troops
*   Lv11: Information on the number of target’s Subordinate Cities
*   Lv14: Information on the number of target’s defending troops
*   Lv17: Information on the target’s Walls HP, amount of reinforcements, Archer Tower’s level, list of all types of Traps and their level
*   Lv19: Ability to use Truce Agreement Informant
*   Lv21: Information on the type of incoming troops
*   Lv25: Information on the type of target’s defending troops
*   Lv27: Information on the type of target’s reinfo

content:
9/15/2023 – added Subordinate city production.

8/17/2023 – Royal Thief rewards updated to the latest.

 8/14/2023 – Garuda rewards updated to the latest.

 2/1/2022 – Respond to Hydra drop item changes.

 1/27/2022 – Added Nian.

 1/5/2022 – Added Legendary Hydra.

 12/15/2021 – Added Warlord 5.

 12/3/2021 – Added Ymir, Lava Turtle 5.

 11/19/2021 – Added Cerberus, Witch 5.

 11/13/2021 – Added Golem 5.

The following is a list of ways to get Refine Stones. Unfortunately, there is currently no way to earn a large amount of them at once, except by paying for them, so the only way is to get them steadily, little by little, in various ways.

The following are relatively decent methods.

– Crazy Eggs Event

– Gather Troops Event – Luxury treasure chest

– King’s Path Event – Day 4: Wheel of Fortune

If you want to refine Ares equipment, Achaemenidae equipment, or dragons in earnest, you will need a huge number of refining stones. Be careful not to waste them.

Reference: Required amount per refinement

*   Ares Equipment: 200 pieces
*   Dragon – Celtic Demon: 50 pieces
*   Dragon – Norway Ridge: 100 pieces

summary: 8/14/2023 – Garuda rewards updated to the latest.
content:
* This article is about the scrolls needed to craft equipment. 

[Here’s how to get “Tactic Scroll.”](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/how-to-get-tactic-scroll-en/ "How to Get Tactic Scroll")

8/14/2023 – Garuda rewards updated to the latest.

4/11/2023 – Added details about “Astrolabe”.

 3/17/2023 – Added that Tyche’s Wheel of Fortune will be discontinued. Also, a major addition was made to the Civilization Equipment section.

 11/9/2022 – The odds of winning Tyche’s Wheel of Fortune have been changed and announced, so the relevant section has been updated.

 7/15/2022 – Update to the relevant section as the probability of winning Tyche’s Wheel of Fortune has been published.

 5/25/2022 – Major updates to the Civilization Equipment Scrolls section.

 11/20/2021 – Added Cerberus.

 10/8/2021 – Updated information on Plantagenet Scroll.

 8/7/2021 – Updated information on Plantagenet Ring.

 6/12/2021 – Updated information on Plantagenet Ring.

 4/28/2021 – Added about Plantagenet Ring which will be added in ver3.87.11 update.

 12/30/2020 – Support for equipment name change by ver 3.86.4 update

The Scroll is necessary for the craft of medium to high level equipment in a [Forge](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/forge-en/ "Forge") and [Wonder](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/wonder-en/ "Wonder"). It is not sold in “Store” or “[Alliance Shop](https://evonyguidewiki.com/en/alliance-shop-item-list-en/ "Alliance Shop Item List")“, but you can get it in the following way.
